heading: Funding for preparation of final agency decisions regarding discrimination complaints
label: 2209i Funding for preparation of final agency decisions regarding discrimination complaints
text: On and after , agencies and offices of the Department of Agriculture may utilize any available discretionary funds to cover the costs of preparing, or contracting for the preparation of, final agency decisions regarding complaints of discrimination in employment or program activities arising within such agencies and offices.November 10, 2005
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:, , .Pub. L. 108–447, div. A, title VII, § 763118 Stat. 2847Dec. 8, 2004, , .Pub. L. 108–199, div. A, title VII, § 762118 Stat. 39Jan. 23, 2004
